player_notes.kawhi leonard: Scored 34 points with six 3-pointers vs. Dallas Tuesday — high-confidence performer, showing full health and usage. Strong floor for points and 3PM props tonight vs. OKC.
player_notes.shai gilgeous-alexander: 25 pts, 8 assists vs. injury-depleted Lakers Tuesday. Thunder on 6-game win streak facing Clippers tonight; SGA in elite form.
player_notes.stephen curry: Second game back from right knee injury; logged 17 points with limited workload. Monitor for minutes restriction — may not be at full usage yet vs. Lakers tonight.

game_notes.LAL vs GSW: Lakers described as 'injury-depleted' after Tuesday's blowout loss; Deandre Ayton called out for struggles by coach Redick. Monitor Lakers injury report — reduced rotation could inflate or deflate individual prop values.
game_notes.OKC vs LAC: Thunder on 6-game win streak, heavy favorites vs. Clippers. Kawhi Leonard (34 pts Tuesday) leads Clippers as key prop target; OKC rotation depth could limit SGA's minutes in a blowout.
